description: 趙小七 — 正在瘋狂解讀林逸的行為。手托下巴，眼神專注，背景有旋轉的腦洞特效。
prompt: anime style male cultivator, young man late teens, sky-blue themed disciple robes with cloud patterns, neat short black hair, intense thinking expression with narrowed focused eyes, hand on chin, small glowing gears and lightbulb symbols floating around head, furiously writing in notebook, half-body portrait, transparent background, solid magenta #FF00FF background
